name: Wellgistics Health, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Incorporated in 2022, we are a holding company for existing and future planned operating companies centered around pharmaceuticals and healthcare services. We seek to be a micro health ecosystem, with a portfolio of companies consisting of a pharmacy, wholesale operations, and a technology division that provides a novel platform for hub and clinical services.
